## Summary

Explain the repository problem and the smallest complete change.

## Evidence

- [ ] Behavior changes have a focused RED-to-GREEN test or a documented coverage gap.
- [ ] Documentation claims are corroborated by code, tests, configuration, or confirmed intent.
- [ ] Generated adapters were rebuilt from `skills/docs/` and parity-checked when applicable.
- [ ] No credentials, private data, hidden reasoning, or sensitive local paths are included.

## Verification

List the exact commands run and their results. Note anything skipped and why.

## Safety

- [ ] Read-only and approval boundaries remain intact.
- [ ] Unrelated dirty-worktree changes are preserved.
- [ ] Path confinement and explicit invocation are not weakened.
